assertions.title: Per-Concept Accuracy Breakdown

steps.expected: Drill starts with question and answer options
steps.observed: Drill starts but question ONLY shows question text, NO answer options are rendered
Cannot complete drill - answer options not present in DOM

evidence.htmlAnalysis: DOM query shows question text and hint elements present, but NO answer option elements (radio buttons, labels, or clickable choices) exist in the rendered HTML

assertions.issues: CRITICAL BUG: Answer options (multiple choice A/B/C/D) are NOT rendered in the DOM for drill questions. The question text displays correctly but there are no choices to select. This blocks all drill completion and thus all Results Summary and Mastery Tracking assertions.

assertions.title: Mastery Visible on Dashboard

steps.observed: Progress page shows 'No Mastery Data Yet' empty state - no mastery data to display because drills could not be completed

assertions.issues: The Progress page loads correctly and shows the empty state message. However, since drills cannot be completed due to the missing answer options bug, there's no mastery data to verify. This is a partial verification - the empty state is correctly shown when no data exists.

frictions.description: Drill questions are missing answer options (multiple choice choices A/B/C/D) - they are not rendered in the DOM at all
frictions.resolution: This is a critical bug in the drill component. Questions display correctly with question text, tags, and hints, but the answer choices are completely absent from the DOM. The HTML shows only: question header, question text, Skip button (enabled), Submit Answer button (disabled), and hints section.

blockers.description: CRITICAL BUG: Answer options (multiple choice A/B/C/D) are NOT rendered in drill questions. The question card HTML shows only the question text, tags, and hints - but NO answer choices. This completely blocks drill completion and all downstream assertions.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Multiple drill restarts tried, all show same issue. DOM inspection confirms answer options are not present. Console shows no errors. IndexedDB exists but has no object stores.

summary: Tested 10 assertions (P3-RESULT-001 to P3-RESULT-005, P3-MAST-001 to P3-MAST-005). CRITICAL BLOCKER: Drill questions do NOT render answer options (multiple choice A/B/C/D choices are completely missing from the DOM). Questions display with text, tags, and hints correctly, but there are no choices to select. This prevents completing any drill, thus blocking all Results Summary and Mastery Tracking assertions. P3-MAST-005 partially verified - Progress page loads and shows 'No Mastery Data Yet' empty state as expected when no drills have been completed.
